title: Cursor IDE "Agent Review->Find Issues" work on current branch full code (git pushed) or only local changes?
author: Rimaurya Apple
text:
I am trying to use the code review features in Cursor (Agent Review -> Find Issues
), but I'm finding it unclear how to control the "scope" of the review. I want to know if Cursor can natively find issues in a full branch or PR, or if it is limited only to local, uncommitted changes in the current branch/workspace.
